title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hitachi India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hitachi India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Hitachi India are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hitachi India:
Hitachi India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hitachi India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
